title: Demonstrative Pronoun
tagline: This, That, These, Those — Point करो और बोलो!
summary: Demonstrative pronouns (This/That/These/Those) वो words हैं जिनसे हम किसी चीज़ की तरफ point करके बात करते हैं। 'यह मेरी किताब है' = 'This is my book.' 'वह उसकी कार है' = 'That is his car.' 'ये मेरे दोस्त हैं' = 'These are my friends.' 'वे लोग कौन हैं?' = 'Who are those people?' आज इन चारों को पूरी तरह समझेंगे।
hindiSummary: जब हम किसी चीज़ की तरफ इशारा करके बात करते हैं — 'यह, वह, ये, वे' — तो English में इन्हें Demonstrative Pronouns कहते हैं। यह shopping में, office में, classroom में, हर जगह use होता है। 'This is wrong' 'That was good' 'These are expensive' — यही रोज़ बोलते हैं हम।
whatYouWillLearn: This = यह (singular + near) — पास की एक चीज़
That = वह/वो (singular + far) — दूर की एक चीज़
These = ये (plural + near) — पास की बहुत चीज़ें
Those = वे/वो (plural + far) — दूर की बहुत चीज़ें
As pronoun: This is my book. (subject की जगह)
As adjective: This book is mine. (noun के साथ)
Questions: What is this? / What are these?
Questions: Is this correct? / Are those yours?
Negative: This is not right. / Those are not mine.
In conversation: 'Look at this!' / 'What about that?'
Shopping: 'How much is this?' / 'I'll take those.'
Past with demonstratives: 'That was a great presentation.'
whyImportant: Demonstrative pronouns हर conversation में use होते हैं। जब भी आप किसी चीज़ की तरफ point करते हैं या refer करते हैं, ये words use होते हैं। Shopping, classroom, office, home — हर जगह।
realLifeUsage: Shopping: 'How much does this cost?' / 'I want those shoes.'
Office: 'Please review this document.' / 'That meeting went well.'
Teaching: 'Open this chapter.' / 'These examples are important.'
Phone: 'This call is important.' / 'That message was from the boss.'
Restaurant: 'I'll have this dish.' / 'What is that dessert called?'
Presentation: 'This slide shows our growth.' / 'Those were last year's figures.'
Home: 'This is my room.' / 'Those are my parents.'
Travel: 'This is platform 4.' / 'Is that the right bus?'
Hospital: 'This report shows improvement.' / 'Those medicines are for morning.'
Email: 'Regarding this matter...' / 'As discussed in that meeting...'

dailyGoal.evening: Point at 20 things around you and make sentences — 20 min
dailyGoal.night: Write 10 sentences using all 4 demonstratives — 15 min

motivationalQuote: This is your moment. That was your past. These are your opportunities. Those are your fears. Choose wisely!

practiceTarget.speakingTarget: Point at objects and make sentences using all 4 demonstratives
practiceTarget.writingTarget: Write a short paragraph describing your room using demonstratives
